heading: Examples
body:
The examples use the `movies` collection in the `sample_mflix`
database. Each example in this section uses a different index
definition to demonstrate different features of the operator.

Before you run the example queries on your cluster, [Load Sample Data Into Atlas](sample-data) on your cluster, and create the
suggested index. To learn more about creating a MongoDB Search index using the
UI, API, or CLI, see [create a MongoDB Search index](ref-create-index). The index definitions use
the name `default`.

If you name your index `default`, you don't need to specify an
`index` parameter in the [$search](pipe.$search) pipeline
stage. If you give a custom name to your index, you must specify this
name in the `index` parameter.
